recall.details: MemoryItem table not migrated and no embedding provider configured

reason: Code is clean and tests pass, but MemoryItem table does not exist in 6.37 database and no embedding provider is configured. Deploy requires prisma migrate deploy + provider env vars.
nextStep: Classic to confirm embedding provider credentials, add EMBEDDING_MODEL/EMBEDDING_BASE_URL to env, run prisma migrate deploy, then run scripts/memory-vector-eval.mts --seed --limit=50 to validate 50% recall gate.
